title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MCX International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MCX International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
MCX International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Howrah. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MCX International Enterprises:
MCX International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MCX International Enterprises!
